---
title: "Session 5: Hands-on: Gold-Standard Annotation & Agreement"
subtitle: "Day 2 · Annotation, Gold Standards & Metrics (2-2)"
format: revealjs
metadata-files:
  - _slides.yml
---

<!-- STUB DECK — structure only; content to be filled in before the course. -->

# Session 5: Hands-on: Gold-Standard Annotation & Agreement

## 📋 Agenda

- Re-annotate a sample using a prepared scheme
- Compute inter-annotator agreement
- Compare against the published gold and against LLM annotations

## 🎯 Learning Objectives

By the end of this session, you will be able to:

<!-- to be added -->

# Re-annotate a sample

## Re-annotate a sample

<!-- to be added -->

# Inter-annotator agreement

## Inter-annotator agreement

<!-- to be added -->

# Compare: gold vs. LLM

## Compare: gold vs. LLM

<!-- to be added -->

# Any questions?
